column1: Project Trinity - Draft IT Cost Plan
Generated: 2026-03-28 | Based on: Trinity_Project_Schedule.csv (192 tasks / 6 phases)
Assumptions: 8 hrs/day; costs are fully-loaded labour only (excl. hardware / software licences / travel); shared tasks charged to each assigned resource in full; 0-day milestones = 0 hrs

column2: AP IT Team (incl. Regional IT Leads - AP share)
AM IT Team (incl. Regional IT Leads - AM share)
EMEA IT Team (incl. Regional IT Leads - EMEA share)
1. Days = sum of task durations from Trinity_Project_Schedule.csv for each assigned resource (shared tasks charged to each resource in full)
2. Regional IT Leads (111 shared days) split equally across AP / AM / EMEA and added to respective regional team totals
3. JCI IT (General + TSA Services) covers all 6 phases including 18-month TSA operations period (Phase 5–6)
4. Bosch IT (Joint JCI collaboration tasks) covers Phase 3–6 joint handover / TSA exit tasks where resource is listed as JCI IT + Bosch IT
5. Steering Committee 0-day quality gate milestones billed at 0 hrs; only Project Charter Approval (5 days) billed
6. Co-Locator Partners and MSP/ITO field support costs not included — to be added as separate vendor contracts
7. Hardware / software / WAN circuit / data centre lease costs excluded — labour only
8. Blended EMEA rate applied at EUR 180/hr per instruction; note EMEA region is smallest in device count (~700 devices) but highest day rate
